creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
I don't see any public visible progress, so may i ask: what is ongoing in the background? :D

Since we have some pending ports/issues that needs www/webkit2-gtk with 2.44.x: would it be an option to create a parallel port with 2.44.x, build ports with the new version that supports this and fix the rest without blocking anything else? We often do that with the rubygem ports - is this a viable option here too?

What do you think?
